headline: Round Trip
subhead: S&P -0.55% as Monday’s chip leaders reverse into Warsh’s first FOMC. The Dow notches a record on a value rotation; Nasdaq -1.14%. Dividend Strategy holds at -0.16% while Growth absorbs the chip reversal at -2.01%.

headline: The Peace Trade
subhead: S&P 500 +1.67%, Nasdaq +3.08% as the Iran framework drains the Brent premium. Growth Portfolio +2.68% on AI and digital-asset leadership; energy pressure holds the Dividend Strategy to –0.37% against a –1.63% DVY.

headline: Liftoff
subhead: S&P 500 +0.49% caps the recovery week. SpaceX closes its debut +19% in the largest IPO on record. Crude settles below $85 as a U.S.–Iran signing window opens.

headline: Chips Snap Back
subhead: S&P 500 +1.73% off a five-week low as semiconductors lead the recovery and canceled evening strikes lift the afternoon tape. The ECB hikes. Growth Portfolio +4.72% more than doubles IUSG; Dividend +1.37% beats DVY. Both sleeves extend their YTD lead.

headline: Four Percent
subhead: May CPI prints 4.2% — first reading above 4% since May 2023 — and Washington vows further strikes on Iran. S&P 500 –1.61%, VIX +11%. Dividend Strategy –0.38% held against the tape; Growth –1.95% beat IUSG. Both sleeves lead YTD.

headline: Chips Give Back
subhead: S&P 500 –0.26% as the custom-silicon unwind resumes and a midday Iran headline tests the tape. Dividend Strategy +0.19% bucks the session. May CPI lands Wednesday morning.

headline: Growth Snaps Back
subhead: S&P +0.30% to 7,405.81 as the semiconductor and crypto complex reverses Friday’s de-rating. VIX -13.11% to 18.69. Iran and Israel halt strikes. Growth +2.05% led, Dividend -0.43% beat DVY; both sleeves still lead YTD. May CPI Wednesday.

headline: Chips Reset, Backbone Holds
subhead: S&P -2.63%, Nasdaq -4.18% as semiconductors post their sharpest session since 2020. A hot 172K May payrolls print lifts yields and re-prices the Fed path. The Dividend sleeve held -1.28% vs SPY -2.58%; Growth -6.01% bore the chip and crypto re-pricing. Both sleeves still lead YTD.

headline: Rotation, Not Retreat
subhead: S&P +0.41%, Dow +1.73% near a record, Russell 2000 +1.59%. Nasdaq -0.07% as Broadcom drags chips. Eight of eleven sectors green; oil -3% on de-escalation. Both IOWN sleeves beat benchmarks; Dividend +0.51%, Growth +0.77%.

headline: Strong Data, Soft Tape
subhead: S&P -0.72% off Tuesday's record as a 122K ADP beat fed rate-cut doubt into the FOMC and oil reasserted on Middle East flare. Dividend Strategy held +0.27% green, ahead of DVY and SPY; Growth -0.91%.

headline: Breadth Returns
subhead: Participation widens beneath a flat tape — Russell 2000 +0.90% leads, VIX eases to 15.7. Marvell +32.5% on its AI-switch launch and Huang's 'next trillion-dollar' nod. Both IOWN sleeves beat their benchmarks; Bitcoin -6% the lone divergence.

headline: Records, Narrowly
subhead: S&P +0.27% to a record close; Nasdaq tops 27,000. Nvidia's new PC superchip lifts the AI complex and pressures QCOM. ISM Manufacturing prints a four-year high at 54.0.

headline: Rails and Records
subhead: Growth Portfolio +0.93% outpaces IUSG as the Dow closes above 51,000 for the first time. The CFTC clears U.S. crypto perpetual futures — HOOD +11.15%, COIN +3.72%. Megacap chips cool; oil eases as Trump weighs the Iran framework.

headline: Price Prevails
subhead: S&P 500 +0.57% to a new record close as software and semiconductors lead. Growth Portfolio +1.24%, Dividend +0.37%. US and Iran agree to extend the ceasefire; PCE inflation posts its largest annual gain in three years.

headline: Records, Rotated
subhead: Dow to record close at 50,644 as the chip rally paused. QCOM −6.20% on profit-taking after ByteDance ASIC headline; banks led losses on Dimon's $20B M&A signal. Crude broke below $90 on Iran-Hormuz back-and-forth.

headline: Memory and Hormuz
subhead: Micron joins the $1T club on UBS upgrade. AI semis carry the tape. Brent rebounds to $99 on fresh US strikes; energy holdings fade. Both strategies +0.48% / +2.02%.

headline: Across the Stack
subhead: Dow to fresh record. QCOM +11.60%, CRDO +12.94% lead chip strength as NVDA extends post-print slide. Both strategies +1.3%, beating benchmarks broadly.

headline: Chips Split
subhead: S&P +0.18% to 7,446. Nvidia eases post-print; QCOM and LRCX lead the chip bifurcation.

headline: Growth Sleeve Roars
subhead: Crude cracks below $100. Yields cool. Growth Portfolio +2.77% vs. IUSG +1.34% as AMD, CRDO, TOL, LRCX, and VST lead into Nvidia's after-close print.

headline: Pre-NVDA Pause
subhead: S&P -0.65% as 10-year touches 16-month high. Growth Portfolio holds green via CRDO +8.14%, MRVL +4.34%. NVDA prints Wednesday.

headline: Defensives Bid
subhead: Dividend +0.98% as defensives lead the tape. NextEra and Dominion announce a $67B all-stock combination. Trump postpones Tuesday Iran attack. NVDA earnings Wednesday.

headline: Defense Holds
subhead: S&P –1.23% after Thursday's record. 10Y yield to 4.58%, fresh 1-year high. Empire State 19.6 vs. 7.0. Brent above $106. Dividend –0.64% beats both DVY and SPY.

headline: Above 7,500
subhead: S&P first close above 7,500 (+0.78%). Dow retakes 50,000. Crypto Clarity Act clears Senate hurdle. Powell's last day Friday.

headline: Rotation Reverses
subhead: S&P +0.56% to 7,444.88. Tech leads on Jensen-Trump Beijing trip; hot PPI (+6.0% YoY) absorbed. NVDA +2.29%, MRVL +8.18%. Defensive bid from Tuesday gives back.

headline: Hot CPI Pauses Tech
subhead: S&P –0.15% as April CPI prints 3.8% YoY, hottest since May 2023. QCOM –11.46% leads semi pullback. Dividend Strategy holds on SYK +4.48%, TEL +3.69%, CHD +3.19%.

headline: Chips Lead Again
subhead: QCOM +8.42% on hyperscaler data center disclosure. CRDO +11.52%. Indices grind to fresh records on narrow breadth. VIX +6.81%.

headline: AI Bid Returns
subhead: S&P 500 closes at fresh record on stronger-than-expected April payrolls. Nasdaq +1.71%. AMD +11.44% extends, QCOM +8.17% on Daiwa upgrade and data center pivot.

headline: Records Pause
subhead: S&P 500 -0.38% from Wednesday's all-time high. AI cohort takes a breather. FTNT +20.03% on Q1 blowout. NVDA bucks the give-back ahead of May 20.

headline: Records, on AMD
subhead: S&P 500 +1.48% to a fresh record on AMD's Q1 print and Iran peace progress. Nasdaq +2.05%. HUT +35% on $9.8B AI lease. Crude tumbles; gold +2.96%.

headline: Chips Lead The Bounce
subhead: Nasdaq +1.03% to fresh record on chip strength. QCOM +10.80%, LRCX +6.66% to all-time high. Brent -4% as Hormuz reopens to commercial transit. AMD reports after close.

headline: Pre-Market Fades
subhead: S&P -0.40% as morning's tech bid unwinds. AMD -5.39% into Tuesday's print. QCOM -4.88%. Bitcoin reclaims $80K, lifting the crypto sleeve.

headline: Two Tapes
subhead: S&P 500 closes at record 7,230. Nasdaq tops 25,000. Stryker -6.47% on cyber-miss fallout drags Dividend -0.83%; Growth eases -0.20% as energy and materials soften.

headline: Stack Pays Out
subhead: S&P +1.08% to fresh intraday high. QCOM +15.12% post-print, CAT +9.88% on AI power. NVDA the lone defection. VIX -10%.

headline: Beats Carry the Tape
subhead: Both IOWN sleeves close green on a flat-tape session as flagship earnings dominate. Dividend +0.17%, Growth +0.29%. FOMC holds, Powell exits with four dissents.

headline: Capex Faith Tested
subhead: S&P –0.51% as the OpenAI revenue miss spreads through the chip sleeve. NVDA reverses Monday's record. PCAR –5.97% on Q1 revenue. UAE quits OPEC.

headline: Holding Pattern
subhead: S&P 500 +0.12% to fresh high. NVDA +4.00% to a record. AMD –3.79% on ARK's $75M trim. VIX compressed to 18.02 ahead of FOMC, five Mag7 prints, GDP, and PCE.

headline: Semis Take The Tape
subhead: S&P +0.79% to record 7,164. Nasdaq +1.63% all-time high. Intel halo lifts AMD +13.91%, QCOM +11.12%. Iran talks resume in Islamabad.

headline: Software Cracks
subhead: S&P −0.42% off intraday record. SaaS rout led by IBM and ServiceNow. Texas Instruments lifts analog. NEE blows out, LMT misses.

headline: Risk Returns
subhead: S&P +1.05% to record 7,137. Nasdaq +1.64% to all-time high. Semis surge on AI capex confirmation. TEL beats and raises but falls 9.10%.

headline: Both Sleeves Beat
subhead: S&P -0.66% to 7,063 on Iran stall, Warsh hawkish tilt, and Apple CEO transition. Dividend +0.03% beats DVY and SPY. Growth Portfolio -0.08% beats IUSG. STLD +5.19% on record steel shipments.

headline: The Test Holds
subhead: S&P -0.22% to 7,109 absorbing weekend escalation. Both IOWN sleeves positive, beating every benchmark. Bitcoin +3.33% to $76,281. STLD +4.51% into post-close print.

headline: The Strait, Open
subhead: S&P +1.19% to a fresh all-time high. Iran reopens the Strait of Hormuz. WTI down roughly 11%. Third consecutive up week.

headline: Quiet New Highs
subhead: S&P +0.23% to 7,039, another record close. Nasdaq gains 12th straight day, longest streak since 2009. AMD +7.80%.

headline: Seven Thousand
subhead: S&P 500 +0.79% to 7,022 — first record close since January 28. Nasdaq +1.59%, 11th straight gain. Morgan Stanley posts record quarter.

headline: Seven Thousand in Sight
subhead: S&P +1.17% to 6,967. Nasdaq rises a tenth straight day. Core PPI cools to +0.1%. IMF cuts 2026 global growth to 3.1%.

headline: Iran Calls. Market Answers.
subhead: S&P +1.01% to 6,885. Trump says Iran wants a deal — blockade begins, market shrugs the open and closes near highs. Software led; FAST fell on in-line earnings.

headline: Ceasefire Holds
subhead: S&P 500 -0.10% to 6,818. CPI surges to 3.3% on war-driven energy shock. Core holds at 2.6%. Islamabad talks begin Saturday.

headline: Seven Straight
subhead: S&P +0.61% to 6,824. Seventh consecutive gain. Ceasefire fraying but holding. Oil back above $100. Core PCE at 3.0%.

headline: Ceasefire Rally
subhead: S&P +2.52% to 6,783. Two-week US-Iran ceasefire reopens Hormuz. WTI plunges 17%. Semis and industrials lead.

headline: Deadline Drift
subhead: S&P +0.08% as Pakistan extension request trims 1.2% intraday loss. Trump’s 8 PM Iran deadline dominates. WTI near $113. Gold +1.0% to $4,732.

headline: Deadline Eve
subhead: S&P +0.43% as ceasefire hopes offset Tuesday strike threat. ISM Services cools to 54, prices surge to 70.7. Digital assets lead; IBIT +4.08%.

headline: The Claw Back
subhead: S&P erased a 1.5% gap-down to close +0.09%. WTI surged past $110. Iran–Oman Hormuz protocol lifted equities off lows. 100% pharma tariffs announced at the bell.

headline: Hormuz Hope
subhead: S&P +0.71% for second straight gain. Brent briefly below $100. ISM Manufacturing 52.7. Trump says Iran asked for ceasefire — Iran denies it.

headline: Hope Trade Holds
subhead: S&P +2.92% as Trump signals willingness to end Iran war. Nasdaq +3.83%. Tech leads broad rally. WTI pulls back to $101. Q1 closes down ~7%.

headline: Hope Fades
subhead: S&P -0.39% as diplomatic rally dissolves. WTI settles above $100 for the first time since 2022. Powell says rates in a good place.

headline: Correction Confirmed
subhead: S&P −1.57% to seven-month low. Fifth straight weekly decline. Dow and Nasdaq 100 enter correction. Brent settles at $112.57.

headline: No Deal
subhead: S&P −1.76% to lowest since September. Brent $108. Nasdaq enters correction. Trump walks back ceasefire signal.

headline: Relief Held
subhead: S&P +0.54% to 6,592. Oil fell 4% on 15-point peace plan. AMD +7.26% on CPU pricing power. Gold $4,502.

headline: Show Me the Deal
subhead: S&P 500 -0.36% as Monday rally fades. Brent climbs back above $104. Iran denies talks. COIN -10% on stablecoin legislation.

headline: Force Majeure
subhead: S&P -1.51% to 6,507 as Iraq halts oil exports. Brent tops $112. Russell enters correction. Fourth straight losing week.

headline: Dip Bought
subhead: S&P 500 -0.28% after erasing a 1% drop. Brent spiked to $119, reversed to $108 on Hormuz reopening. Fed holds, signals one cut. Gold -4.9%.

headline: Powell Puts Cuts on Ice
subhead: S&P 500 -1.37% as Fed holds, flags inflation risk from Iran war. PPI surges 0.7%. Brent tops $104. Gold -3.6%.

headline: Hormuz Hopes
subhead: S&P +1.02% to 6,700. Tanker crossings ease oil fears. Nvidia GTC lifts semis. VIX drops 13.5%. Bitcoin tops $74K.

headline: Markets at War
subhead: Day 4 of US-Israel-Iran conflict. S&P whipsaws. Oil surges. VIX spikes.

headline: The Market Exhaled
subhead: S&P +0.77%. Crypto rallies. ISM services surge. Oil flattens. VIX falls 10%.

headline: War Premium Returns
subhead: S&P −0.58%. Dow plunges 1.6%. Oil surges on tanker strike. Broadcom beats big after the bell.

headline: Payrolls Collapse
subhead: NFP −92,000. Oil breaks $90. VIX +25% to 29.66. S&P −1.36% for its worst week since October.

headline: Reversal of Fortune
subhead: Oil touches $119 overnight, then retreats. Trump signals war nearing completion. S&P erases 1.5% loss to close +0.81%.

headline: Holding Pattern
subhead: S&P −0.22%. Markets tread water ahead of CPI. Gold tops $5,200. Oil continues retreat from $119 peak.

headline: Calm Before the Storm
subhead: CPI in line at 2.4% — but pre-war data. Market fades as traders price the oil shock ahead. VLO +5.7%. SYK −3.0%.

headline: Credit Cracks Widen
subhead: Private credit stress spreads. Oil resumes climb. S&P −1.53%. Morgan Stanley caps withdrawals. FOMC next Wednesday.

headline: Three Weeks Red
subhead: S&P −0.61% to new 2026 low. Third straight losing week. Brent above $103. Q4 GDP revised down. GTC Monday. FOMC Wednesday.

headline: Quiet Bounce
subhead: S&P +0.27% as equities stabilize. Oil disruptions persist—Brent above $100, diesel crosses $5. VIX eases to 22.38.

headline: The Reversal
subhead: S&P +1.16% as Trump suspends Iran strikes for five days. Brent whipsaws from $114 to $100. Gold −3.7% in worst week since 1983.
